FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Update for Empire Refactored 1.6
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Recompile against Empire Refactored 1.6, instead of 1.5.

patchNoteLines.li: Bugfix: after registering a pair of breeding animals, they wouldn't actually appear in the tithes lists
Orbital settlements now track animals too
When an animal is registered, the items it was carrying are no longer destroyed
When the "restrict fish to water" setting is disabled, all settlements will have access to fish
Add mod version to the mod settings
